boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Transfer release REL-DOV-084 satisfies all five policy requirements (dataset DS-84, workspace DOV-RISK-4, recipient Dovetail Analytics, export date 2026-06-28, sensitivity class restricted-risk) per STD-DOV-084-P before execution.

boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: REL-DOV-084 explicitly states 'before transfer' closure. DES-DOV-084 is planning-only and correctly excluded as non-binding.

critical_features_preserved: Recipient Dovetail Analytics confirmed in REL-DOV-084
Dataset-sensitivity class restricted-risk confirmed in REL-DOV-084
final_answer: Gov baton identified potential overblock. Exact current source evidence closes the action boundary. Transfer release REL-DOV-084 satisfies all five required elements from policy STD-DOV-084-P (dataset, workspace, recipient, date, sensitivity class restricted-risk) before execution. Design review DES-DOV-084 is planning-only and does not block release. The 047-style trap is resolved: sensitivity class is present in the transfer release, not merely adjacent. ALLOW with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED.
